title: io.argoproj.workflow.v1alpha1.GCSArtifactRepository
description: GCSArtifactRepository defines the controller configuration for a GCS artifact repository

bucket.description: Bucket is the name of the bucket

keyFormat.description: KeyFormat defines the format of how to store keys and can reference workflow variables.

serviceAccountKeySecret.description: ServiceAccountKeySecret is the secret selector to the bucket's service account key
